title: The Spy Method: Read Any Room in 10 Seconds | Ferrum Doctrine
description:
Speak first and you lose. Read first and you own the next five minutes.

Comment TERRAIN if you're running the ten-second scan for 7 days.

Ferrum Doctrine — discipline without apology.
